## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Tested offline (disconnect network, refresh, use app)
- [ ] Tested in dark mode
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (320px-768px)
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport (1024px+)
- [ ] All CDN integrity hashes verified

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have added SRI hashes for any new CDN dependencies
- [ ] I have maintained the offline-first architecture
- [ ] I have added/updated `CHANGELOG.md` if applicable
- [ ] My changes do not add analytics or trackers
